title: sm-max-tokens-truncation-repeat
description:
This is a continuation of sm-max-tokens-truncation-repeat. In the current window, the sm persona again emitted two consecutive failed runs with explicit truncation signatures at 2026-05-29T13:30:58.678913+00:00 and 2026-05-29T13:30:58.721665+00:00. Both failures name the failure mode directly: JSON parse failure after `finish_reason=length`, with one run reaching `max_tokens=65536`. The pattern matches the previously escalated factory-side truncation issue and has now recurred across multiple prior concern intervals.

The immediate operational impact in this window is limited because the failures were brief and followed by a succeeding sm run at 2026-05-29T13:30:58.750308+00:00, so there is no evidence here of a sustained queue stall. However, the recurrence indicates the underlying truncation condition remains unresolved and can still burn attempts whenever the sm path encounters the same prompt/response shape. The watcher note also reports a separate cluster of fast sandbox-style "tests not green after run" failures across onboarder, test_implementer, and dev, but those failures are low-cost, test-harness-like, and do not alter the clearer repeating signal.

Plausible explanation remains a factory-side response-shaping or persona-settings issue on the sm path rather than a story-domain bug, because the error text itself diagnoses output truncation and malformed JSON, and the same signature has repeated over several L2 intervals. Given the repeated, clearly attributable pattern and the existing prior concerns, this now warrants renewed L3 attention even though this single window did not show high spend or a blocked queue.

evidence.summary_excerpt: Repeated sandbox-style failures appeared across onboarder, test_implementer, and dev, plus a renewed pair of sm JSON parse failures caused by truncation at max_tokens with finish_reason=length.

evidence.excerpt: persona=sm success=false error="json parse failed at max_tokens=65536 finish_reason=length: Unterminated string starting at: line 1 column 9 (char 8)" tokens_out=122880 model=deepseek/deepseek-chat
persona=sm success=false error="json parse failed at max_tokens=8192 finish_reason=length: Unterminated string starting at: line 1 column 7 (char 6)" model=deepseek/deepseek-chat

{"noteworthy":"Seven failed runs appeared: four fast sandbox-style failures across onboarder/test_implementer/dev, one onboarder failure with null error, and two sm failures whose error text explicitly diagnoses truncation at max_tokens with finish_reason=length."}
{"noteworthy":"A retry storm is present for onboarder with 3 failures in the window; sm also failed twice in quick succession with the same truncation family of error."}

escalation_reason: Recurring sm truncation pattern has persisted across multiple watcher-note intervals, including this window's two back-to-back JSON parse failures with explicit `finish_reason=length` and `max_tokens` signatures. L3 judgment is needed because the error class is factory-attributable, clearly diagnosable, and remains unresolved despite repeated prior escalation.
